title: pseudo-fumaria acaulis
intro: Pseudo-fumaria acaulis, also known as false fumewort, is a flowering plant species in the family Papaveraceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of pseudo-fumaria acaulis include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Pseudo-fumaria acaulis can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
